line_1.question_used: Which Colorectal trials had 3 or more arms and used a multikinase inhibitor as a control?
line_1.pred_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Trial name", "Cancer type", "Number of arms", "Control regimen", "Type of control" FROM "clinical_trials" WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Colorectal' AND "Number of arms" >= 3 AND "Type of control" = 'Multikinase inhibitor'

line_2.question_used: Find clinical trials for renal cell cancer that used nivolumab in combination with other treatments?
line_2.pred_sql: SELECT "NCT", "PubMed ID", "Trial name", "Author", "Year", "Trial phase", "Number of arms", "Total sample size", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Type of combination", "Control regimen", "Type of control", "Lines of treatment", "Clincal setting in relation to surgery", "Primary endpoint", "Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?", "Secondary endpoint", "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria", "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion", "Type of follow-up given", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control", "Type of therapy", "Control arm", "Clinical setting", "Included in MA" FROM "clinical_trials" WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Renal cell' AND "Treatment regimen" LIKE '%Nivolumab%' AND "Monotherapy/combination" = 'Combination'

line_3.question_used: Show trials of CTLA-4 for non-small cell lung cancer that began in 2018 or later?
line_3.pred_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Trial name", "Author", "Year", "Trial phase", "Cancer type", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Control regimen", "Type of control", "Primary endpoint", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control", "Clinical setting", "Included in MA" FROM "clinical_trials" WHERE "Class of ICI" = 'CTLA-4' AND "Cancer type" = 'NSCLC' AND "Year" >= 2018

line_5.pred_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Trial name", "Year", "Trial phase", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Type of combination", "Control regimen", "Type of control", "Primary endpoint", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control", "Clinical setting", "Included in MA" FROM "clinical_trials" WHERE "Trial phase" = 'Phase 3' AND "Cancer type" = 'Renal cell' AND "Treatment regimen" = 'Nivolumab+Ipilimumab'
